inputs.label: Red Meat Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Beef, lamb, and pork have high carbon footprint due to methane emissions and land use. Input weekly consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Beef, lamb, and pork have high carbon footprint due to methane emissions and land use. Input weekly consumption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sığır, kuzu ve domuz eti, metan emisyonları ve arazi kullanımı nedeniyle yüksek karbon ayak izine sahiptir. Haftalık tüketimi girin.

inputs.label: Poultry Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Chicken, turkey, etc. have moderate carbon footprint compared to red meat.

businessContext_i18n.en: Chicken, turkey, etc. have moderate carbon footprint compared to red meat.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tavuk, hindi vb. kırmızı ete kıyasla orta düzeyde karbon ayak izine sahiptir.

inputs.label: Dairy Consumption (Milk Equiv.)
inputs.businessContext: Includes milk, cheese, yogurt. Emissions from enteric fermentation, manure, and feed production.

businessContext_i18n.en: Includes milk, cheese, yogurt. Emissions from enteric fermentation, manure, and feed production.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Süt, peynir, yoğurt dahil. Enterik fermantasyon, gübre ve yem üretiminden kaynaklanan emisyonlar.

inputs.label: Fruits & Vegetables
inputs.businessContext: Fresh produce has relatively low carbon footprint, but transport and refrigeration contribute.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fresh produce has relatively low carbon footprint, but transport and refrigeration contribute.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taze ürünler nispeten düşük karbon ayak izine sahiptir, ancak nakliye ve soğutma katkıda bulunur.

inputs.label: Grains & Starches
inputs.businessContext: Wheat, rice, maize, etc. Staple foods with moderate emissions from cultivation and processing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wheat, rice, maize, etc. Staple foods with moderate emissions from cultivation and processing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Buğday, pirinç, mısır vb. Yetiştirme ve işlemeden kaynaklanan orta düzeyde emisyonlu temel gıdalar.

inputs.label: Food Waste
inputs.businessContext: Edible food discarded. Embodies production emissions and generates methane in landfills.

businessContext_i18n.en: Edible food discarded. Embodies production emissions and generates methane in landfills.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atılan yenilebilir gıda. Üretim emisyonlarını içerir ve çöp sahalarında metan oluşturur.

formulas.totalWeeklyCO2: meatCO2 + poultryCO2 + dairyCO2 + plantCO2 + grainsCO2 + wasteCO2

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
